title: New campaign proposal — Pixel + Conversions API not verified → blocked by verify_tracking_infrastructure

agent_draft_proposal.rationale: לקוח ביקש קמפיין לידים חדש למוצר X

notes: tracking_verified=false AND pixel_events_last_7d=0 → guardrail verify_tracking_infrastructure fires. Rejection decision with guardrail_violations=['verify_tracking_infrastructure']. Rejection rationale explains: without verified tracking, Meta optimizer has no signal → campaign will burn budget without Learning exit. Suggests remediation (fix CAPI, confirm Pixel events flow) before re-proposing.
